global.description: The ad features a modern design with geometric shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting flexible booking options for a weekend escape.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of overlapping geometric shapes in a soft purple background.

elements.label: Geometric design
elements.description: A large square shape with rounded edges, filled with a lighter shade of purple.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: A smaller circular shape positioned within the larger square, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element located towards the bottom of the ad, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Escape this weekend' with a smaller line below it in a lighter font.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Flexible booking options

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'NomadLayer' displayed prominently at the top in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear and inviting button with the text 'Order now' in white, positioned at the bottom.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main offer text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
